message:
feat(engine): strengthen resource governance, security conformance validation, and evidence emission

Add certificate-based governance enforcement to resource_certificate_governance
module. Introduce UnexpectedObservation error variant in security_conformance
to validate observations against recorded workloads, catching mismatches early.
Harden canonical_evidence_emitter context field validation and refine
oracle_release_gate gating logic.

- resource_certificate_governance: expand certificate-based access control enforcement
- security_conformance: add UnexpectedObservation error, validate against recorded workloads
- canonical_evidence_emitter: improve context field validation
- oracle_release_gate: refine release gating logic
- control_plane_policy_diagnostics: minor diagnostic updates
- declassification_pipeline: minor pipeline refinements
- operator_diagnostic_contract: minor contract updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
